modifiers.name: Swift
modifiers.description: -20% light attack stamina cost this run.

modifiers.name: Burden
modifiers.description: -10 max stamina, +25% XP gain this run.

modifiers.name: Last Rites
modifiers.description: Survive one fatal blow at 1 HP. Once per run.

modifiers.name: Scavenger Instinct
modifiers.description: Double loot from your first encounter.

modifiers.name: Lone Hunter
modifiers.description: Find more loot, but venture with less health.

modifiers.name: Relentless
modifiers.description: Stamina flows freely, but your guard wavers.

modifiers.name: Death Wish
modifiers.description: On the edge of death, your attacks become ferocious.
